nodes.label: Home Screen Wireframe
nodes.description: PromptLab home/dashboard screen. Green gradient background with the PromptLab logo top-left, cat avatar top-right, a central search bar with AI sparkle icon, three main navigation cards (My Skills, Prompt Library, Learning Lab), a 'Continue Learning' section with horizontally scrollable topic chips (Trending Skills, Community, Design, Grapho Science, Prompt, etc.), and the mascot cat holding a phone in the bottom-right corner.

nodes.label: Learning Lab / Lesson List Screen Wireframe
nodes.description: Mobile course detail screen for 'Advanced Prompt Engineering'. Shows progress (3 of 8 lessons completed, 2h 15m total), tab bar (Main Path, Supplemental Lessons, Mini-Assignments), a vertical list of 8 lessons with completion status icons, time estimates, and an 'In Progress' badge on Lesson 4. A 'Start Lesson' CTA button is at the bottom with the help-cat widget in the corner.
nodes.norm_label: learning lab / lesson list screen wireframe

nodes.label: Login Screen Wireframe
nodes.description: Mobile login/authentication screen in Portuguese. Displays the PromptLab mascot cat at top, the PromptLab brand name, email and password fields (labeled 'Seu e-mail' and 'Sua senha'), a forgot-password link ('Esqueci minha senha'), a primary 'Entrar' (Login) button, social OAuth options (Google, Apple, email), a sign-up link ('Crie agora'), and the help-cat widget in the bottom-right corner.

nodes.label: Skills / Prompt Library Screen Wireframe
nodes.description: Desktop skills/prompt library browsing screen. Header area features the mascot cat holding a pointer. Horizontal category filter tabs: Creativity, Marketing, Coding, Education, Productivity. Below are skill cards in a grid layout, each with a title (e.g., Prompt for Storytelling, Customer Support Prompt, Data Analysis Script, Graphic Design Prompts, Resume Writing), a cat illustration, and a difficulty badge (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced).

nodes.label: Cat Avatar / User Profile Icon
nodes.description: Small circular icon of a green cat face with stripes, used as the user profile avatar in the app's navigation header.

nodes.label: Help Cat Widget Icon
nodes.description: Green cat face icon with a question mark and 'HELP' label, used as a floating help/support widget button appearing in the bottom-right corner of multiple screens.

nodes.label: PromptLab Mascot Character (Green Cat with Graduation Cap)
nodes.norm_label: promptlab mascot character (green cat with graduation cap)

nodes.label: Homepage Mobile Screenshot (Original)
nodes.description: Mobile view of PromptLabz homepage showing green header with app name, search bar, 4 feature cards (Habilidades, Prompts, Laboratório, Conquistas), and a 'Continue Aprendendo' section with category chips. Validation checklist visible at bottom: Inter Font Applied, Mobile Responsive, 4 Feature Cards.

nodes.label: Homepage Redesigned Mobile Screenshot
nodes.description: Redesigned mobile homepage showing personalized greeting 'Olá, Aluno!', an 'Explore habilidades' search bar, a 2x2 grid of category cards (Skills, Agentes, Comunicação, Design), and a bottom navigation bar with Home, Perfil, and Comunidade tabs. Validation: Inter Font, Mobile Layout, 4 Cards.

nodes.label: Homepage Desktop Screenshot
nodes.description: Desktop view of PromptLabz homepage with dark green header, hero tagline 'Seu Laboratório de Ideias com IA', full-width search bar, 4 feature cards (Habilidades, Biblioteca de Prompts, Laboratório de Aprendizado, Minhas Conquistas), category chips row (Habilidades em Alta, Desenvolvimento, Design & UI, IA & Media, Cloud & Infra), and a validation panel showing branch 'claude/inter-font-application-j4q8f1', Status: Pronto para produção.

nodes.label: Promo Free Month Banner
nodes.description: Promotional banner in Portuguese for PromptLabz offering '1 Mês Grátis' (1 Free Month). Features a cute green cat mascot wearing a graduation cap and holding a gift box, surrounded by 'FREE' badges and sparkles. Tagline: 'Teste a IA do PromptLab sem custos por 30 dias'. CTA button: 'Ativar Oferta' (Activate Offer). Light green background, used as a marketing asset.

nodes.label: Email Confirmation Preview
nodes.description: Email template preview for PromptLabzz account confirmation. Shows the cat mascot logo at top, title 'Confirme seu email', personalized greeting to 'Ana', instruction to confirm email for login/progress/personalized trails. Includes a 'Ação segura' (Safe Action) note, a green 'Confirmar email' CTA button, fallback URL (https://app4.seudominio.com/confirm-email), and a note to ignore if account was not created.

links.source_location: protects commits/merges in the same project repo

utility script in same project, not in package.json scripts
validates supabase connectivity for same DB
application entry point matching project structure
Profile previews first 3 achievements, Achievements shows all; both from useAchievements
both handle OAuth/session establishment and redirect to /home
both are part of password recovery flow using useAuth
both use lessonsData, loadProgress/saveProgress, useLives, useAchievements

links.notes: Same green cat character with graduation cap and glasses, shown holding two laptops with code symbols — used for coding/development context
Same green cat mascot holding a lightbulb and paintbrush — represents creativity/ideation context
Green cat mascot in a dynamic leaning pose holding a smartphone — used on the home/landing page
Identical image content to public/assets/mascot-home.png; stored in brainstorm session folder — likely a working copy or reference used during brainstorming session 2959-1781212630
File named '-new' suggests it supersedes the original mascot-learn.png; the new version shows a more detailed desk-study scene vs. a simple portrait crop
Green cat mascot sitting at a desk studying with a book and pen — new version of learn illustration
Cropped/close-up green cat mascot face — older or alternate learn illustration
File named '-new' suggests it supersedes the original mascot-login.png; new version is a full standing pose while original is a simple cropped portrait
Green cat mascot standing upright pointing at a phone/tablet — new version for login page
Cropped green cat mascot holding a smartphone — older or alternate login illustration
Green cat mascot giving thumbs up and holding a code speech bubble — used for promotional/marketing context
JPEG screenshot showing the mascot teacher in a Prompt Library UI context — appears to be the source/reference image from which mascot-teacher.png was derived
Screenshot shows the mascot in a Prompt Library UI labeled 'Prompt Library', providing brand/product context
Green cat mascot holding a pointer stick in a teaching pose — used for teacher/instructional context
The green cat with graduation cap and glasses is the central visual identity character for the PromptLab brand, appearing consistently across all pages/contexts

links.note: Both show the same PromptLabz homepage with identical sections (Habilidades, Prompts, Laboratório, Conquistas, Continue Aprendendo) but different viewport sizes
Redesigned version has different layout (2x2 grid, personalized greeting, bottom nav) compared to original mobile screenshot; filename explicitly says 'redesigned'
Promo banner is a marketing asset for PromptLabz free trial offer, likely used within the app or in campaigns linked to the homepage
Email confirmation is part of the PromptLabzz user registration/authentication flow, feeding into the main app represented by the homepage
Promotional offer likely leads to registration, which triggers the email confirmation flow
